en: A MIKTAM OF DAVID.Preserve me, O God, for in you I take refuge.
zh: 神啊！求你保守我，因為我投靠你。

en: I say to the LORD, "You are my Lord; I have no good apart from you."
zh: 我 曾對耶和華說：“你是我的主， 我的好處不在你以外。”

en: As for the saints in the land, they are the excellent ones, in whom is all my delight.
zh: 至於世上的聖民， 他們都是尊貴榮美的人，全是我所喜愛的。

en: The sorrows of those who run after another god shall multiply; their drink offerings of blood I will not pour out or take their names on my lips.
zh: 追求別神的，他們的愁苦必定加多。 他們所奠的血祭，我不祭奠； 我的嘴唇也不提別神的名。

en: The LORD is my chosen portion and my cup; you hold my lot.
zh: 耶和華是我的產業，是我杯中的分； 我所得的業分，你親自為我持守。

en: The lines have fallen for me in pleasant places; indeed, I have a beautiful inheritance.
zh: 準繩量給我的是佳美之地， 我的產業實在令我喜悅。

en: I bless the LORD who gives me counsel; in the night also my heart instructs me.
zh: 我要稱頌那指導我的耶和華， 我的心在夜間也勸戒我。

en: I have set the LORD always before me; because he is at my right hand, I shall not be shaken.
zh: 我常常把耶和華擺在我面前， 因他在我右邊，我必不會動搖。

en: Therefore my heart is glad, and my whole being rejoices; my flesh also dwells secure.
zh: 為此我的心快樂，我的靈 歡欣， 我的肉身也必安然居住。

en: For you will not abandon my soul to Sheol, or let your holy one see corruption.
zh: 因為你必不把我的靈魂撇在陰間， 也必不容你的聖者見朽壞 。

en: You make known to me the path of life; in your presence there is fullness of joy; at your right hand are pleasures forevermore.
zh: 你必把生命的路指示我， 在你面前有滿足的喜樂， 在你的右手中有永遠的福樂。
